title: NEGG Earnings Estimates and Consensus Forecasts - Barchart Analysis
text:
Newegg Commerce (NEGG) Earnings Estimates and Analyst Consensus Analysis from Barchart.

Current Analyst Consensus: The consensus estimates reflect significant uncertainty about future earnings given the company's recent history and transition to profitability.

Earnings Per Share Estimates: FY2025 Actual: -$0.23. FY2026 Estimate: Consensus around breakeven to small profit, with high variance among forecasters reflecting uncertainty.

Revenue Estimates: FY2025 Actual: $1.44B. FY2026 Estimate: $1.35B (midpoint of guidance range of $1.23B-$1.47B).

Estimate Confidence: The high variance in estimates reflects the speculative nature of betting on a turnaround story. Conservative estimates assume slower growth and margin pressure. Bullish estimates assume sustained GPU demand and improved marketplace momentum.

Key Estimate Drivers: GPU market demand sustainability. Success in building marketplace third-party seller business. Competitive dynamics with Amazon and Best Buy. Ability to maintain cost controls while scaling operations.

Revisions Trend: Estimates have been revised upward over the past 2-3 quarters as quarterly results have beaten expectations on profitability metrics, though revenue has been more in-line.

Valuation Implications: Trading at approximately 41x forward P/E estimates (if FY2026 earnings estimates materialize) is significantly above the market average and suggests high growth expectations are priced in.
